title: Rebecca Faces the Fighters
description: Pages 22–23 focus on rebecca faces the fighters, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Marines, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as d Block begins with Rebecca hated by the crowd, until Cavendish turns the audience's cruelty back on itself and the battle begins.

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Green Bit: Law vs. Doflamingo and Admiral Fujitora.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Way back then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's a story that goes back 800 years, law...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: 20 Kings... from 20 countries GA- Thered at the center of the world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: and formed one massive or- sanization.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The Pre- Sent-Day "World Go- Vermont"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Those kings, the "creators".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: They took their respective families and moved to the Holy Land of Mariejois...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Only the ne- Fertari family of Alabama declined that particular op- portunity... so it ended up being just 19 families.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Even now they reside there... reigning over this world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The Descan-Dants of Those "Creators" are, of course... the "tenryubito"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: In short, 800 years ago... the Royal Fami- lies of those 19 countries de- parted.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Do you see where I'm going with this?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Naturally, New Kings were elected in each of those coun- tries...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: And New Royal Fami- lies were born.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: In the case of my dressrose...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: That new royalty was the Riku clan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: and the "creators"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: The ones who set out for the Holy Land at Ma- Riejois...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: were those of the Don- Quixote clan!!!

summary: Rebecca Faces the Fighters focuses on Marines, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as d Block begins with Rebecca hated by the crowd, until Cavendish turns the audience's cruelty back on itself and the battle begins.
